raw_consumer_statement:
I made one order {$160.00} of item named XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX Sealed Case ( 6 Blind Boxes ) from the merchant named XXXX XXXX on XXXX XXXX. 
On XXXX XXXX I got another email says my order has been shipped out. 
On XXXX XXXX I received one text message says my order has been delivered. Then I started to look into all my cameras around my house since I did not receive my order at all that no image shows this order has been delivered. 
I sent one email to the merchant XXXX on XXXX XXXX, then I reported one dispute to my credit card company Citibank XXXX XXXX credit card XXXX Yesterday I received one message from Citibank says they have received the shipping history from the merchant then decided I have to pay the {$160.00}. This is absolutely unfair for me, I paid this {$160.00} for nothing? 
Today I tried to look into more information provided with Citibank, the delivery status does not have a successful delivery proof image at all. And the merchant 's store named XXXX XXXX XXXX also shows not existed. This is just a 100 % fraud! I have printed out all the paperworks regarding to this order. Plz help me to get my money back. 

Sincerly, XXXX XXXX
